All Packages

  • Package Summary 
    Package Description
    <Unnamed>  
    jline.api
    This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models
    jline.examples
    This package contains several example models
    jline.io
    Classes for input/output from the command line or XML files
    jline.lang
    Classes to declare basic elements of a model
    jline.lang.constant
    This package contains constants used in the definition of queueing characteristics
    jline.lang.distributions
    This package contains statistical distributions used to specify arrival rates, service rates, and item popularities
    jline.lang.layered
    This package contains the classes used the specify LayeredNetwork objects
    jline.lang.nodes
    This package contains the classes used the specify Network objects
    jline.lang.processes
    Classes to model stochastic processes that are not i.i.d.
    jline.lang.sections
    Classes that model the individual sections that form a Network node
    jline.lang.state
    Classes that model the state of a network and its individual nodes
    jline.lib
    Classes that encapsulate external dependencies
    jline.lib.ltinversion
    Classes for Laplace transform inversion
    jline.lib.thirdparty
    Classes that partially migrate third-party libraries to Java
    jline.solvers
    This package contains the solver superclasses and related data structures
    jline.solvers.ctmc
    Classes that implement solution approaches based on Continuous-Time Markov Chain solution
    jline.solvers.env
    Classes that implement solution approaches for stochastic models in random environments
    jline.solvers.fluid
    Classes that implement solution approaches based on mean-field and fluid approximations
    jline.solvers.fluid.analyzers
    Classes that embody different fluid ODE analysis algorithms
    jline.solvers.fluid.odes
    Classes that generate the ordinary differential equations (ODEs) used in the Fluid solver
    jline.solvers.fluid.smoothing
    Classes that implement the smoothing method for transient fluid analysis
    jline.solvers.jmt
    Classes that rely on the Java Modelling Tools (JMT) suite solvers
    jline.solvers.ln
    Classes that define LINE's Layered Network (LN) solver
    jline.solvers.lqns  
    jline.solvers.mam
    Classes that analyze networks using matrix-analytic methods
    jline.solvers.mva
    Classes that analyze networks through Mean-Value Analysis (MVA)
    jline.solvers.mva.analyzers
    Classes that embody different mean-value analysis methods
    jline.solvers.mva.handlers
    Classes for coordinate the execution and performance metric estimation in MVA-based algorithms
    jline.solvers.nc
    Classes that analyze networks using Normalizing Costant (NC) methods
    jline.solvers.ssa
    Classes that analyze networks using Stochastic Simulation Algorithm (SSA)
    jline.solvers.ssa.events  
    jline.solvers.ssa.metrics  
    jline.solvers.ssa.state  
    jline.solvers.ssa.strategies  
    jline.util
    This package contains some fundamental data structures and utilities
